roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X DA ORALLY MOVES TO REDUCE COUNT ONE TO A MISEMEANOR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADVNL:001/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED, IF DEFENDANTSUCCESSFULLY PAYS THE  RESTITUTION WITH NO NEW ARRESTS THROUGH JANUARY 2021, THE PLEA AND  PROPOSED SENTENCE IS TO BE DISMISSED/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/
